objective: Identify right moment to initiate selling

case_1.name: He's Already Horny
case_1.approach: Skip small talk, use his words, direct but authentic

example.him: its been a while... hey im horny
example.you: well your timing is perfect because i had a very special outfit in my closet... let me take it on

case_2.name: Smooth Transition
case_2.approach: Listen, find cheeky angle, use his words

example.him: its so hot in here, like 40 degrees
example.you: if its so hot why dont you take your clothes off?

case_2.formula: He says X → Find sexual angle → Make playful → Transition

rules: Don't sell during aftercare (unless he insists)
Use his own words for authenticity
bad_example: im just laying in bed... want to buy a script?
principle: Always initiate smoothly, never sell out of nowhere
